floor_history.headline: fable-blitz recon: this is libc vsprintf/sprintf -- the %-format interpreter (flags/width/precision struct at sp+0x210, jtbl_80015CA4 45-case conversion switch, backward digit buffer). Sibling helpers

frontier.hypothesis: Source is the classic PsyQ/SN prnt.c vsprintf: a `while ((c = *fmt++))` loop, flags-struct default copied from a static initializer (D_8009BE10), switch(c) for conversions -- and the decomp.me gcc2.7.2-psx corpus contains a near-verbatim match to crib the exact spelling from.
frontier.mechanism: libc functions ship identically across PsyQ titles; the jtbl shape (c-0x4C, 45 entries) and magic 0xCCCCCCCD unsigned-div are stable fingerprints of one source.
frontier.next_probe: python3 tools/decomp_me_scrape.py search --asm-file asm/funcs/func_80079A30.s; inspect top hits for the prnt/vsprintf scratch; then draft from that shape and sandbox.

frontier.hypothesis: The varargs prologue (sw a1-a3 pre-adjust, va from old-sp+8) reproduces with a real `(char *dst, const char *fmt, ...)` + va_start(ap, fmt) under this GCC -- the fake-varargs-explicit-homing spelling is only the fallback if maspsx/prologue_fix mangles the pre-prologue store order.
frontier.mechanism: GCC 2.7.2 MIPS stdarg homes unnamed arg registers a2/a3 plus spills a1's home when the last named arg lives in the incoming-args area; prologue scheduler places the homing sw's before the sp adjust.
frontier.next_probe: Draft with real stdarg first; diff the first 20 prologue instructions in the sandbox; if the homing order diverges, read .claude/rules fake-varargs-explicit-homing and re-spell per debug_printf (src/text1b_b.c:1899).

frontier.hypothesis: The flags/width/prec state lives in a 12-byte struct copied by-value from static D_8009BE10 (three lw/sw pairs = GCC struct assignment expansion), NOT field-by-field init -- and the sign-char is a struct byte at +1 (sp+0x211).
frontier.mechanism: GCC 2.7.2 expands small struct assignment to word loads/stores (expr.c emit_block_move, 4-byte pieces); field inits would emit immediate stores instead.
frontier.next_probe: Declare `static const struct fmtstate default_state` extern as D_8009BE10, assign `st = default_state;` in the '%' arm, and confirm the 3xlw/3xsw block reproduces in the sandbox diff.
